payload:
BitNet-SOLE Research Loop — Wave 3: Foundation + Base-Free + Serving + Evolve.

ARCHITECTURE: Ternary base (BitNet-2B-4T) + ternary LoRA adapters (QAT+STE) + Grassmannian skeleton (frozen A, 17x decorrelation filter) + runtime LoRA serving (no merge).
STATE: Read .ralph/current_direction.md for active work. Read HYPOTHESES.yml Wave 3 section.
CONTEXT: VISION.md (rewritten 2026-03-22), FINDINGS.md, references/BITNET_SOLE_RESEARCH.md.

SCALE CONSTRAINT: micro only. LOCAL Apple Silicon via MLX. $... [truncated, 3241 chars total]

Orphan resolution: bitnet_retrain_evolve has REVIEW (PROCEED) but missing LEARNINGS.md. Re-emitting to trigger analyst cycle. PPL 4.4x improvement, retrain-from-scratch works as Evolve primitive, status supported with caveats.

exp_bitnet_retrain_evolve: PROCEED (orphan resolution). PPL 4.4x improvement proves retrain-from-scratch as Evolve primitive. KR-Test underpowered (n=50, 12% power). Revised gate: PPL primary, KR non-regression, cos<0.05. Power analysis corrected to n~1700. Analyst: create LEARNINGS.md.

exp_bitnet_retrain_evolve: PPL/KR-Test divergence is literature-confirmed (LoRA learns style before facts). Revised Evolve gate: PPL primary, KR non-regression, cos<0.05. 4 confirming papers, 0 contradicting. No hypothesis modifications needed — gate calibration was already flagged. 6 new references identified.

exp_bitnet_spectral_surgery_quality_gate: KILLED (all 3 criteria). K1: 1/5 adapters improved PPL (+0.4%), 4 worsened. K2: 0/5 KR-Test improvement. K3: 420-468s per adapter (>5min threshold). Root cause: short-trained rank-16 LoRA already has efficient singular value spectra -- surgery has nothing to fix. Harmful side effect: 3.2x cosine increase, slight composition degradation.

exp_bitnet_spectral_surgery_quality_gate: KILL confirmed. All 3 kill criteria fail. PPL: 1/5 improved, 4 worsened. KR-Test: 0/5 improved. Speed: 420-468s (>300s threshold). Root cause: short-trained rank-16 LoRA already has efficient spectra. Secondary: SVD refactorization increases cosine 3.2x, harmful to composition. Clean negative result, no math errors.

experiment: exp_bitnet_spectral_surgery_quality_gate. Core learning: spectral surgery is zero-sum on short-trained adapters because spectra are already efficient. Confirming papers: 4, contradicting: 2 (minor, untested policy variants). No hypothesis modification needed. SVD re-factorization is composition-hostile (3.2x cosine). Evaluation-only quality gate confirmed sufficient. 2 new refs added (ESSA arXiv:2507.04453, Make LoRA Great Again arXiv:2502.16894).

exp_bitnet_llamacpp_serving SUPPORTED. K1 PASS: llama.cpp loads BitNet GGUF + 5 LoRA adapters (3 converter patches needed). K2 PASS: 47.1% overhead at 5x adapters (9.4%/adapter, threshold 50%). K3 PASS: hot-swap produces identical outputs. Base 63.9 t/s, 5x LoRA 33.8 t/s. CPU-only (Metal unsupported for TQ types). 1.16 GiB total with 5 adapters. Production serving path validated.

exp_bitnet_llamacpp_serving: REVISE. BLOCKING: adapter size contradiction — 82.5 KB claimed but rank-16 all-projections 30-layers should be ~82.5 MB. Either converter truncated tensors (K2 invalid) or unit error throughout (memory analysis wrong). Inspect GGUF tensor count, fix sizes, re-run K2 if truncated. NON-BLOCKING: (2) rename K3a to deterministic-reproducibility not hot-swap, (3) fix MATH.md KB→MB unit, (4) fit affine overhead model, (5) state K2 confidence interval.

exp_bitnet_llamacpp_serving: REVISE fixes applied. Blocking: unit error (KB→MB) fixed throughout — adapters are 82.5 MB each (verified on disk), K2 data valid. Non-blocking: K3a renamed, affine model fitted, K2 95% CI [41.8%-52.4%] added. Ready for re-review.

exp_bitnet_llamacpp_serving: PROCEED. llama.cpp CPU-only serves BitNet-2B-4T with runtime multi-LoRA. 82.5 MB/adapter (unit error fixed), 47.1% overhead at N=5 (CI [41.8%,52.4%]), affine model 9.5%+7.5%*N, ~1.53 GiB total. Hot-swap via /lora-adapters API. 3 converter patches needed. Metal not supported. K2 margin thin but honest.

experiment: exp_bitnet_llamacpp_serving. Core learning: LoRA serving overhead is bandwidth-bound (10x above FLOP prediction), 7.5%/adapter marginal cost confirms N=5 as rank-16 CPU limit — per-token routing is the scaling path. 4 confirming papers (S-LoRA, LoRAFusion, Punica, Compress-then-Serve), 0 contradicting on overhead magnitude. 2 new references added. No hypothesis modification needed — result reinforces exp_bitnet_per_token_routing as next priority.

exp_bitnet_eigenlorax_subspace KILLED (K2). Principal subspace extraction fails: LoRA-A variance only 31.3% at K=16 (Grassmannian skeleton prevents shared structure). PPL gap +80.8% vs scratch (threshold 20%). Fundamental tradeoff: orthogonality for composition vs subspace sharing for evolve. Evolve stays with retrain-from-scratch.

exp_bitnet_eigenlorax_subspace KILLED (K2). Adversarial review confirms kill is correct. LoRA-A variance 31.3% at K=16, PPL gap +80.8% vs scratch. Grassmannian orthogonality prevents subspace transfer. Evolve stays retrain-from-scratch.

payload.core_learning: Orthogonality-transfer tradeoff is fundamental: Grassmannian packing prevents ALL SVD-based cross-adapter methods. Evolve confirmed retrain-from-scratch. Hypernetwork B-generation is most promising alternative.
payload.hypothesis_update: eigenlorax_subspace killed, no hypothesis changes needed — converging pattern with spectral surgery and LoRI kills

payload: exp_bitnet_meta_scaffold KILLED. FOMAML destroyed scaffold (base PPL 12x worse after ternary quant). Meta-loss did not converge (1.2% reduction over 100 steps). Adapter resilience finding: only 3% worse individual PPL despite 12x worse scaffold. Both kill criteria triggered.

exp_bitnet_meta_scaffold KILL CONFIRMED. FOMAML implementation incorrect (outer gradient at restored scaffold, not inner-loop endpoint), composition penalty gradient-disconnected, meta-loss actually divergent (-6.8%). Adapter resilience (3% degradation on 12x worse scaffold) is valid finding but needs adapter/base ratio caveat. consecutive_kills=2.

experiment=exp_bitnet_meta_scaffold, core_learning=FOMAML has irreducible bias at K=50 making scaffold meta-optimization futile without iMAML+STE+preservation constraints; GaLore scaffold remains strongest base-free candidate, confirming=3 (Nichol 2018 FOMAML bias + Rajeswaran 2019 iMAML + Recover-LoRA adapter resilience), contradicting=2 (Meta-LoRA succeeds but different setup + Meta-Learning-the-Difference uses full 2nd order), hypothesis_update=none (already killed), consecutive_kills=2

exp_bitnet_float_merge_fp32: KILLED on K3 (fp32 31% slower than runtime LoRA) but bf16 merge SUPPORTED as practical winner (16.7 t/s, 0.4% PPL loss). K1 PASS: merge 7% better PPL than runtime. K2 PASS: memory identical. Dual-mode serving recommended: bf16 merged for always-on adapters, runtime LoRA for on-demand. Wave 3 micro complete (10/10 nodes resolved).

exp_bitnet_float_merge_fp32: 4 fixes required. (1) Fix runtime LoRA 1/N^2 scaling bug in compose_adapters_runtime — averages both A and B by 1/N producing 1/N^2 effective scaling. (2) Retract wrong PPL explanation — gap is from scaling bug not bf16 truncation. (3) Mark K2 INCONCLUSIVE not PASS — MLX lazy eval makes RSS identical. (4) Add stddev to latency measurements. bf16 vs fp32 merge comparison unaffected. Systemic bug in ~4 other experiments.

exp_bitnet_float_merge_fp32: REVISION COMPLETE. Fixed 1/N^2 scaling bug in compose_adapters_runtime, retracted wrong PPL explanation, K2 INCONCLUSIVE, latency stddev added. Runtime LoRA PPL improved 7.72->7.17 (gap was entirely from bug). Still KILLED on K3. bf16 merge SUPPORTED for latency advantage only. Systemic 1/N^2 bug noted in ~4 other experiments.

exp_bitnet_float_merge_fp32: v2 revision PROCEED. All 4 fixes verified (1/N^2 bug, PPL retraction, K2 INCONCLUSIVE, stddev). fp32 KILLED K3 (8.5 vs 12.0 tok/s). bf16 merge SUPPORTED (16.7 tok/s, 39% faster, 0.6% PPL cost). All three methods PPL-equivalent. Cross-term gap 0.15% at N=5 -- monitor at scale. Systemic 1/N^2 bug affects ~4 other experiments.

exp_bitnet_float_merge_fp32: bf16 merge SUPPORTED, fp32 KILLED. 1/N² bug is systemic (also in PEFT #1155). 3 confirming, 3 contradicting refs found. Cross-terms O(N²) — monitor at scale. LoTA-QAF multi-adapter is highest-value next. URGENT: audit ~4 experiments for same 1/N² pattern. 3 new refs added to REFERENCES.yml.

max_runtime
